prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Pathfinder / Golarion inspired epic political fantasy world map for the terrain type dual_continent.
Scene/backdrop: two major fantasy continents separated by uneven inner seas and narrow straits, diverse nation-states, sprawling harbor cities, ancient ruins, desert kingdoms, northern frozen wastes, jungle interiors, adventurer routes, faction territories, holy war scars, wizard schools and lost vaults.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated political fantasy atlas, aged ink-on-parchment, ornate region coloring, hand-painted terrain relief, detailed old-world cartography, epic Pathfinder-like campaign mood.
Composition/framing: tall portrait world map, asymmetric continents of different sizes; the sea separation is diagonal and S-shaped with C-shaped gulfs, L-shaped ocean channels and jagged straits, not a simple vertical divider; include compass rose, decorative border, trade routes, city icons, ruin markers and political boundary shading without readable text.
Geography constraints: realistic complex coastlines with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, capes, fjords, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, inland seas, marshy estuaries and varied landforms; span many climates including frozen wastes, deserts, jungle interiors, temperate plains, mountains, wetlands, volcanic badlands and magical corrupted regions.
Avoid: mirrored continents, clean vertical split, simple two-blob layout, modern satellite image, board-game UI, readable labels, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
